title: A genome-scale CRISPRi perturbation atlas of human induced pluripotent stem cells
summary: Researchers generated a comprehensive transcriptional regulatory map of human iPSCs using large-scale CRISPR interference screening. This resource provides an essential reference for understanding gene regulation networks in pluripotent stem cells, with applications spanning drug target discovery and stem cell-directed therapeutics.

title: Efficient generation of epitope-targeted antibodies with Germinal
summary: The study demonstrates Germinal an AI-powered platform for de novo design of antibody complementarity-determining regions targeted to specific epitopes, achieving high experimental success rates. This represents a significant advancement in computational antibody engineering workflows.

title: Broad-spectrum Ebola vaccine
summary: A broad-spectrum vaccine candidate capable of providing cross-protective immunity against multiple Ebola virus species has been reported. The advance addresses a critical unmet need in global health by offering potential protection across the diverse Ebolavirus genus rather than a single serotype.
